description:
Rust and Corrosion-Resistant Material: Made from thick metal iron, this gate building kit is highly durable with rust, corrosion, and weatherproof properties, ensuring it can withstand wind, rain, and snow for long-term outdoor use

Upgraded Load-Bearing Capacity: Featuring a new, thicker design, the adjustable gate kit's increased thickness enhances its load-bearing strength, keeping heavy doors straight and stable for many years

Fit Various Door Sizes: The full gate frame kit is adjustable, fitting door widths from 36 to 60 in. No cutting is required, making it ideal for installing large doors, fences, or double doors in a variety of sizes

Easy Installation: Includes all the necessary accessories, so there's no need to buy extra parts. With quick and simple assembly, even beginners can install the adjustable gate building kit at home with ease
